privacy.title: Privacy Policy (KVKK)
privacy.metaDescription: eCyPro KVKK and GDPR compliant privacy policy — how your personal data is collected, processed, and protected.

content.controller: As the data controller, eCyPro Premium Consulting is responsible for the processing of your personal data under Turkish Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data (KVKK) and the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). You may direct any request, question, or inquiry to info@ecypro.com.
content.data: When you visit our website, request our services, or submit contact forms, we collect: name and surname, email address, phone number, company information, IP address, browser metadata, cookie identifiers, and any other communication data you voluntarily share. We do not request or collect sensitive personal data (health, biometric, etc.).
content.purpose: Your personal data is processed for the purposes of: providing the services you request, fulfilling contractual obligations, managing customer relations, complying with legal obligations, ensuring website security, and improving services within the scope of legitimate interest. Legal bases: KVKK art. 5/2(a,c,e,f) and GDPR art. 6(1)(a,b,c,f).
content.retention: Your personal data is retained for as long as the processing purpose requires and for the minimum legal retention periods stipulated in applicable legislation. Once these periods expire, data is periodically destroyed, anonymized, or deleted in accordance with our data retention policy.
content.rights: Under KVKK art. 11 and GDPR art. 15-22, as a data subject you have the right to: (1) learn whether your personal data is being processed; (2) request information if it has been processed; (3) be informed of the purpose of processing and whether the data is used in accordance with that purpose; (4) know the third parties to whom your data is transferred domestically or abroad; (5) request rectification of incomplete or inaccurate data; (6) request erasure or destruction under KVKK art. 7; (7) request that operations under (5) and (6) be notified to any third party to whom your data has been transferred; (8) object to automated decision-making producing adverse outcomes; (9) seek compensation for damages caused by unlawful processing; (10) withdraw any explicit consent previously given; (11) lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority (the KVKK Board / the EU Member State authority). Requests may be submitted in writing to the Data Controller's address, via registered electronic mail (KEP), or by emailing info@ecypro.com. EcyPro will respond within 30 (thirty) days at the latest.
content.transfer: Your personal data may be transferred domestically and internationally through our service providers (hosting, email, analytics). International transfers are conducted under GDPR art. 46 Standard Contractual Clauses or under KVKK art. 9 explicit consent / adequacy decisions.
content.contact: For all questions, requests, and submissions related to this Privacy Policy: info@ecypro.com — Data Controller: eCyPro Premium Consulting.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: eCyPro terms of service — rights, obligations, payment and refund policy.

content.scope: eCyPro Premium Consulting provides corporate management consulting, event management, and digital brand solutions through www.ecypro.com. **eCyPro is an independent consulting firm**; unless expressly authorised, it does not act as a law firm, audit/CPA practice, investment adviser, or financial institution. The opinions and analyses provided constitute strategic advice and do not substitute binding legal, accounting, or investment opinions. These Terms of Service are binding from the moment you visit the website or engage our services. The final scope and technical specifications of each engagement are defined in a separate service agreement executed per client.
content.independence: **Independent by Design** — eCyPro maintains no partnership, affiliation, franchise, licensing, or service ties with any "Big Four" firm (Deloitte, PwC, EY, KPMG) or any other audit, accounting, or advisory network. We are not a member, correspondent, or subcontractor of any such organisation, and we receive no referral fees from them. This independence is structural and deliberate: it ensures our advice is free from the cross-service conflicts of interest, audit-consulting entanglements, and standardised playbooks that can compromise objectivity. Any reference to a Big Four firm on this website is purely comparative or illustrative and does not imply endorsement, association, or equivalence.
content.obligations: When using the website, you agree to: comply with applicable laws, provide accurate and current information, respect third-party rights, and refrain from any behavior that could threaten site security. Automated scraping, reverse engineering, or unauthorized access attempts are prohibited.
content.payment: Payment and refund terms for paid services are defined in the individual service agreement signed with each client. Direct payments are not collected through this website; all commercial transactions are governed by the service agreement and invoicing process.
content.liability: eCyPro Premium Consulting exercises reasonable care for the accuracy of website content but makes no absolute warranty regarding the error-free nature or uninterrupted availability of content. Within the limits of applicable law, no liability is accepted for indirect, incidental, or unforeseen damages arising from website use.
content.ip: All text, images, logos, trademarks, software, and arrangements on the website are the intellectual property of eCyPro Premium Consulting or its licensors. They may not be reproduced, distributed, or used in derivative works without written permission. Third-party trademarks and content remain the property of their respective owners.
content.dispute: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Turkey. The parties shall first attempt to resolve any dispute amicably; failing that, the courts and execution offices of Istanbul shall have exclusive jurisdiction. For international clients, where the service agreement provides for arbitration, disputes shall be finally resolved under the Rules of Arbitration of the International Chamber of Commerce (ICC, Paris), seated in Istanbul, conducted in English, by a sole arbitrator.
content.contact: For questions related to these Terms of Service: info@ecypro.com.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.metaDescription: eCyPro cookie policy — which cookies are used, their purposes, and how to manage them.

content.what: Cookies are small text files placed on your device via your browser when you visit a website. They serve functions such as remembering site preferences, session management, security, and statistical analysis.
content.types: Our site uses four primary cookie categories: (1) Strictly necessary — required for core site functions and cannot be disabled; (2) Preference — remembers choices such as language and theme; (3) Analytics — gathers anonymized usage statistics; (4) Marketing — measures campaign effectiveness only with your explicit consent.
content.thirdParty: Some cookies are placed by third-party service providers: PostHog (analytics, EU server — `__ph_*` cookies, only with your consent), Google Analytics (analytics), Sentry (error monitoring), EmailJS (form submission), and optionally live chat providers. PostHog data is processed on EU servers; no IP address is stored; retention period is 12 months. These parties' own privacy policies apply.
content.management: You can update your cookie preferences at any time via the cookie banner at the bottom of the site or the 'Manage Cookie Settings' button on this page. You may also reject all cookies through your browser's privacy settings; note that certain site features may not function in that case.
content.consent: Non-essential cookies are loaded only with your explicit consent. You may withdraw your consent and refresh your preferences at any time. Withdrawing consent does not affect the lawfulness of processing carried out prior to the withdrawal.
content.contact: For questions related to this Cookie Policy: info@ecypro.com.
